query:
SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, r.name as role_name, r.code as role_code
FROM users u
JOIN userSystemRoles usr ON u.id = usr.userId
JOIN systemRoles r ON usr.roleId = r.id
WHERE r.code = 'super_admin' AND usr.isActive = 1
LIMIT 5;
command:

WHERE r.code = 'super_admin' AND usr.isActive = 1
